mapper.select: SELECT id, import_type, original_file_name, file_hash, file_size, charset, content, status, confirmed_script_id, confirmed_version_id, created_time, updated_time, created_by, updated_by, deleted FROM raw_import_file WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE raw_import_file SET status = #{status}, confirmed_script_id = #{confirmedScriptId}, confirmed_version_id = #{confirmedVersionId}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
